hooks.command: python3 -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'Before finishing this session, review the changes made and update .agents/wiki/ accordingly: update entity/concept/source/analysis pages that are affected, then append a dated ## [YYYY-MM-DD] entry to .agents/wiki/log.md summarising what changed and which pages now hold the synthesis. Skip only if no wiki-relevant changes were made.'}))"
